mano_cua.result_summary: DSP模式下添加Processor后List视图正常显示7+行完整计算链。设置Preferred modifiers为Proliferator Mk.II (Products)后，List视图从7+行折叠为仅1行(只显示Processor)，子配方链全部消失，Machines列显示'?'，Power显示0kW。Flow视图也退化为单个大色块，失去详细节点标签。计算结果虽然显示'Solved'但显示不完整。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Setting Proliferator Mk. II as Preferred modifier causes List view to collapse from 7+ rows showing full production chain to just 1 row with Processor only. Machines show '?' icon, Power shows 0 kW. Flow view degrades to simplified single-block view. The complete calculation chain display is broken after applying the modifier.
